item.title: Morning Briefing 2026-03-08
item.description:
Good morning. It is Saturday, March 7th, 2026. Welcome to your morning briefing.
We begin with developments in the Middle East, where the conflict between the United States and Iran continues to shape global markets and geopolitical calculations.
Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and military commanders have activated what analysts describe as a no-limits defense strategy. This plan, developed prior to the current conflict, includes a decentralized military structure that allows Iranian forc

item.title: Morning Briefing 2026-03-08
item.description:
Good morning. Today is Friday, March 7th, 2026. Welcome to your morning briefing.
We begin with the conflict in the Middle East, which continues to dominate headlines and is now reshaping global markets.
Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and military commanders have activated what reports describe as a high-risk strategy designed to allow Iranian forces to continue operations even if top commanders are eliminated. This plan, characterized as a decentralized "mosaic defense," is now in effect.

item.title: Morning Briefing 2026-03-08
item.description:
Good morning. Today is Friday, March 7th, 2026. Welcome to your morning briefing.
We begin with the conflict in the Middle East, which continues to dominate global headlines and markets.
Iran has activated what reports describe as a high-risk military strategy designed to continue operations even if top commanders are eliminated. According to reporting from the Wall Street Journal, Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and his military commanders implemented what is being called a decentralized
